name: Teams
description: Microsoft Teams integration for reading and sending messages, managing channels, teams, and members via the Microsoft Graph API.

list_teams.description: List all Microsoft Teams that the authenticated user is a member of.

teams.description: List of teams the user belongs to.

display_name.description: The display name of the team.

get_team.description: Get details of a specific Microsoft Team by its ID.

team_id.description: The unique identifier of the team to retrieve.

display_name.description: The display name of the team.

web_url.description: The URL to open the team in Teams.

list_channels.description: List all channels in a Microsoft Teams team.

team_id.description: The unique identifier of the team whose channels to list.

channels.description: List of channels in the team.

display_name.description: The display name of the channel.

membership_type.description: The membership type: standard, private, or shared.

get_channel.description: Get details of a specific channel within a Microsoft Teams team.

team_id.description: The unique identifier of the team the channel belongs to.

channel_id.description: The unique identifier of the channel to retrieve.

display_name.description: The display name of the channel.

membership_type.description: The membership type: standard, private, or shared.

web_url.description: The URL to open the channel in Teams.

create_channel.description: Create a new channel in a Microsoft Teams team.

team_id.description: The unique identifier of the team to create the channel in.

display_name.description: The display name for the new channel.

description.description: An optional description for the new channel.

membership_type.description: The membership type for the channel: 'standard' (default) or 'private'.

result.description: Whether the channel was created successfully.

id.description: The unique ID of the created channel.

display_name.description: The display name of the created channel.

list_messages.description: List messages in a Microsoft Teams channel, returned in reverse chronological order.

team_id.description: The unique identifier of the team.

channel_id.description: The unique identifier of the channel to read messages from.

limit.description: Maximum number of messages to return (default 20, max 50).

messages.description: List of messages from the channel.

body.description: The text content of the message.

from.description: The display name of the sender.

created_at.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the message was created.

get_message.description: Get a specific message from a Microsoft Teams channel by its ID.

team_id.description: The unique identifier of the team.

channel_id.description: The unique identifier of the channel the message belongs to.

message_id.description: The unique identifier of the message to retrieve.

body.description: The text content of the message.

from.description: The display name of the sender.

created_at.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the message was created.

send_channel_message.description: Send a message to a Microsoft Teams channel.

team_id.description: The unique identifier of the team containing the channel.

channel_id.description: The unique identifier of the channel to send the message to.

message.description: The text content of the message to send.

result.description: Whether the message was sent successfully.

message_id.description: The unique ID of the sent message.

list_members.description: List all members of a Microsoft Teams team.

team_id.description: The unique identifier of the team whose members to list.

members.description: List of members in the team.

user_id.description: The Azure AD user ID of the member.

display_name.description: The display name of the member.

email.description: The email address of the member.

roles.description: The roles held by the member (e.g. owner).

add_member.description: Add a user to a Microsoft Teams team by their Azure AD user ID or email address.

team_id.description: The unique identifier of the team to add the member to.

user_id.description: The Azure AD user ID or email address of the user to add.

result.description: Whether the member was added successfully.

membership_id.description: The unique membership ID of the newly added member.

remove_member.description: Remove a member from a Microsoft Teams team using their membership ID.

team_id.description: The unique identifier of the team to remove the member from.

membership_id.description: The membership ID of the member to remove (obtained from list_members).

result.description: Whether the member was removed successfully.

list_chats.description: List all chats (1:1 and group chats) the authenticated user is part of.

chats.description: List of chats the user participates in.

topic.description: The topic or name of the chat.

chat_type.description: The chat type: oneOnOne, group, or meeting.

list_chat_messages.description: List messages from a specific chat (1:1 or group chat).

chat_id.description: The unique identifier of the chat to read messages from.

limit.description: Maximum number of messages to return (default 20, max 50).

messages.description: List of messages from the chat.

body.description: The text content of the message.

from.description: The display name of the sender.

created_at.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the message was created.

send_chat_message.description: Send a message to a specific Teams chat (1:1 or group chat).

chat_id.description: The unique identifier of the chat to send the message to.

message.description: The text content of the message to send.

result.description: Whether the message was sent successfully.

message_id.description: The unique ID of the sent message.
